title: viola tricolor var. hispida
intro: Viola tricolor var. hispida, also known as Wild Pansy or Heart's Ease, is a flowering plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola tricolor var. hispida include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
